title: mimulus douglasii
intro: Mimulus douglasii, also known as Douglas' monkey flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phrymaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the Pacific coast of North America, known for its bright orange flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Mimulus douglasii can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve to promote wound healing, reduce stress, and alleviate digestive issues.
